entries.text: <Bold>Primary objective completed</>. well done, Station Commander.
New <bold>technologies, modules, items</> and <bold>parts</> are now available for you to unlock...
To continue, select a new objective from the <Bold>Objectives Panel</>...
When you're ready, open the <Bold>Objectives Panel</> to continue expanding your station...
More objectives are available from the <Bold>Objectives Panel</>...
Choose another objective from the <Bold>Objectives Panel</>...
The <Bold>Objectives Panel</> contains new objectives for you...

Located on the fringes of the known galaxy, <Bold>Nova Corp</> has singled out this system for <Bold>exploitation and expansion</>.

As one of our newest <Bold>Station Commanders</>, we expect <Bold>big things</> from you - but <Bold>don't worry</>, I'll be here to guide you along the way...
Open the <Bold>Objectives Panel</> to select an objective and start developing your station.
To reach the next Station Level,
Let us know when you have all of the required items.
We'll be in contact when you've fulfilled all of the objectives.
Better get to work, Station Commander.

we'll need you to construct the following ships:

<Ships>...

the following starships need to be constructed:

<Ships>...

please make sure you construct these ships:

<Ships>...

make sure you have the following starships:

<Ships>...

we'll need you to manufacture the following items:

<Items>...

the following items need to be constructed:

<Items>...

we need these items to be in your HUB:

<Items>...

You've done some truly amazing work in this sector, Commander.

<Bold>Station Command</> has taken notice, and have decided to <Bold>promote</> you to the rank of <Bold>Captain</>!

You should feel extremely proud of yourself...

You've completed the <Bold>initial phase of development</> in this system.

Please continue to expand your station and we'll be in touch very soon with <Bold>new technologies</> and <Bold>further orders</>...
You've completed an Objective - My Compliments.

<Bold>Drone Control Initiated...</>

Welcome to <Bold>Stargate Control Alpha</>, Station Commander...
<Enemy>The Void</> is now only light-minutes away from Terra Prime and we're running out of time...
We need to get that <Bold>Jumpgate Buffer</> back online now, so we can re-initiate <Bold>The Gate</> and escape to the <Bold>TAU system</> before this system is destroyed.

We just need to run a few <Bold>tests</> on your Drone's <Bold>control routines</>...

Follow the steps and then we can get to work.

OK, now we need to clear the <Enemy>wreckage</> from around the damaged jumpgate buffer before we can replace it.

We recommend using your <Bold>Neutron Lazer</> to accomplish this...

We can now <Bold>deconstruct</> the damaged buffer to clear space for the new buffer we'll need to produce...

You can use the <Bold>Sell mode</> to accomplish this.
We need to get a new buffer up and running as soon as we can, but all our factories were <Bold>dismantled</> to build <Bold>The Gate</>...

We'll need to get a small factory up and running to manufacture the <Bold>Stargate Parts</> we need...

Start by collecting the items left in your <Bold>HUB</>.
We'll need some basic materials before we can start building more complex parts...
Construct an <Bold>Atomizer</> to let us turn collected asteroids into raw materials, and a <Bold>Smelter</> to turn these into useable metals.
Now our <Bold>Atomizer</> is up and running we can collect asteroids floating around our station and drop them into the opening to process them.

All factories need to have a <Bold>recipe</> selected in order to function.

Choose the <Bold>Titanium</> recipe now from your <Bold>Smelter's popup menu</>.

Automate the movement of items and materials around your station by <Bold>linking</> modules together - they will intelligently <Bold>send required items</> to modules they are linked to.

Link your <Bold>Atomizer</> to your <Bold>Smelter</> and your <Bold>Smelter</> to your <Bold>HUB</> to start sending items now.

If you have made a mistake linking modules together you can <Bold>unlink</> them by repeating the same link action.

We recommend unlinking your <Bold>Smelter</> from your <Bold>HUB</> now.

We're going to need some <Bold>additional modules</> to create our mini factory.

Please build the required modules so we can continue.
Now <Bold>link</> all of your new modules together as directed to form <Bold>supply chains</>.

Our <Bold>power generation</> is getting dangerously low...

Build a <Bold>Solar Panel</> and <Bold>align</> it to the sun's direction to increase power levels.
Before we continue, please check that these <Bold>advanced functions</> are working correctly as they will come in very useful as your station expands further.
All modules have <Bold>advanced settings</> which give you more control over what they will process and store - please test these functions now.

Completing <Bold>Objectives</> allows us to unlock <Bold>new technologies, items, modules and ships</>.

Select the <Bold>Complete The Gate</> objective now from the <Bold>Objectives Panel</>.

To rebuild the damaged buffer unit we'll need to construct complex <Bold>Stargate Parts</>, using the materials our smelters have processed.

We can use our Drone's <Bold>Synthesizer</> function to produce these parts. This is accessed from the <Bold>Synthesizer Tab</> on your Drone's <Bold>inventory</> popup menu...
Now we've fabricated the required <Bold>Stargate Parts</>, we should place these in our <Bold>HUB</> in order to complete the current Objective.
If you <Bold>run out of materials</> while synthesizing, don't forget to feed more asteroids into your <Bold>Atomizer</>, and collect more completed materials from your <Bold>HUB</>.

Local <Bold>star constellations</> fixed and locked...

Confirmed... We've arrived in the <Bold>TAU system</>, Station Commander...
<Bold>Long-range scans</> reveal that this <Bold>mysterious</> system contains all the raw resources we'll need to develop our <Bold>Intergalactic Arkship</> and escape this galaxy....

However, it appears that <Bold>The Void's</> expansion is <Bold>accelerating</>, and we may not have as long here as we hoped before it reaches us again...

<Bold>So we better get to work, Station Commander!</>
Select an <Bold>Objective</> from the <Bold>Objectives Panel</> to start.

Destined to be <Red>consumed</>
by the insatiable appetite

Of the <Red>monster</>
that lies at its centre...

Our only hope:
To build a <Yellow>vessel</> capable of leaving this galaxy
BUT WE'VE RUN OUT OF TIME

The Void has reached <Yellow>Terra System</>
and soon our home will be destroyed
So we've mined all our remaining resources

A <Yellow>stargate</> that can take us
to the edge of the Galaxy
There we can hide - and build
Jet Booster that dramatically increases your drone's speed for a short time
Launches explosive rockets that can home in on a target
Powerful beam lazer than can destroy enemies and incoming meteors
Scans the local area for items, resources and threats
Consumable that protects your drone from radioactive damage for a limited time
Single-use consumable that instantly restores Drone hitpoints
Absorbs a certain amount of incoming damage and regenerates over time
Deploys a defence micro-drone that can shoot down incoming projectiles
Advanced and extremely powerful energy beam than can destroy enemies and meteors

The ultramassive cosmic entity known only as <Bold>The Void</> has reached <Bold>Terra System</>, and its only a matter of time before your home planet is consumed.

You've mined all your home system's remaining resources to construct <Bold>The Gate</> - an intersteller stargate that can take you to the edge of the galaxy - and buy you some time.

But <Bold>The Gate is damaged</> and it must be <Bold>repaired</> so you can use it to escape Terra System before The Void arrives and all is lost.
Unlocks <Bold>basic production buildings, items</> and <Bold>materials</> essential for turning simple materials into useable items and parts.

<Bold>Matter Printers</> can convert raw materials into more complex items ready to be used in further production chains.

Use the <Bold>Link</> function to automatically feed the output of your <Bold>smelters</> into matter printers to speed up production.
Our <Bold>first priority</> should be making sure our systems survived the journey here, so we'll need to run some <Bold>tests</> on our <Bold>robotic manufacturing facilities</>...

Please produce the <Bold>following items</> and place them in your <Bold>HUB</> to continue:

{REQUIRED_ITEMS}

<Bold>Good job, Station Commander</> - all systems appear operating at <Bold>100% efficiency</>.

We are now free to proceed with the <Bold>next phase</> of our operations here.

You've escaped to the mysterious <Bold>Tau System</> after your home planet is destroyed by <Bold>The Void</>: An ultramassive cosmic entity that is gradually consuming your galaxy.

Your HUB contains the <Bold>genetic material</> and <Bold>uploaded personalities</> of your entire homeworld, ready to be reconstituted once you've reached a safe haven.

<Bold>Your mission:</> To develop and construct an <Bold>Inter-Galactic Arkship</> you can use to escape this doomed galaxy - and The Void - forever.
Unlocks new <Bold>items, materials</> and the <Bold>Fabricator</> which can take simple items and materials and combine them to produce more complex items and simple starship parts.
You can now construct <Bold>Fabricators</> which can take simple items and materials and combine them to produce more complex items and simple starship parts.
Advanced <Bold>scanning technologies</> let you extract powerful technological breakthroughs from any <Bold>alien artifacts</> you may find.

The <Bold>Artifact Analyzer</> is now available from the build menu.

Feed any <Bold>Alien Artifacts</> you may find into this unit to earn <Bold>Tech Points</> which can be spent on powerful upgrades and abilities.
Unlocks high-capacity laminar batteries for storing any excess power your station may generate.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Energy Storage</> module.

You can use <Bold>Energy Storage</> to store excess energy produced by your station ready to restore power levels if you lose power in your station.
Our initial surveys hinted at <Bold>vast amounts of resources</> scattered throughout this system - but now we have to <Bold>find them, and mine them</>...
We should upgrade our HUB with a <Bold>Deep Space Scanner</>. This will unlock the <Bold>System View</> and give us a clearer picture of what is around us...

Please produce the <Bold>following items</> and place them in your <Bold>HUB</> to continue:

{REQUIRED_ITEMS}

<Bold>Deep Space Scanner... Deploying...</>

<Bold>Great job Station Commander</>, the <Bold>System View</> can now be accessed from the <Bold>Map Screen</>....
We're already getting data back from our initial scans, but charting the <Bold>entire system</> will take some time, and there's plenty to do in the meantime.
Unlocks circuit boards and basic computers which are essential components widely used in advanced modules and smaller starships.

Circuit boards and basic computers are now available to manufacture from the Fabricator.

These essential components are widely used in advanced modules and smaller starships.
Unlocks technologies which let you automate raw material extraction by constructing <Bold>Miners</> onto <Bold>Ore Nodes</> that can be found on larger asteroids.

You can now automate raw material extraction by constructing <Bold>Miners</> onto <Bold>Ore Nodes</> that can be found on larger asteroids.

Miners can also be <Bold>built on</> to create mining sub-stations that serve your main station.
Unlocks the Small Shipyard which lets you construct smaller starships to satisfy more complex objectives.

The <Bold>Small Shipyard</> has now been unlocked.

Smaller starships can be constructed here to satisfy orders for <Bold>starships</> and complete later objectives.
Unlocks the <Bold>Production Overview Panel</> which gives you a summary of how many of each <Bold>item, material and part</> in each location your station is <Bold>producing and using</>.

The <Bold>Production Overview Panel</> is a useful tool for optimising your stations.

This screen gives you a summary of how many of each <Bold>item, material and part</> in each location your station is <Bold>producing and using</>, making it easier to locate shortfalls in your production lines.

To perform tasks around the TAU system, we'll need <Bold>ships</> - and lots of them.

Without them we cannot <Bold>explore</> or <Bold>visit other planets</> and <Bold>locations</> - or <Bold>defend ourselves</> from hostile threats...

We need to <Bold>test our ship-building capabilities</> - let's start by producing the following <Bold>basic ships</>:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}
Ship telemetry is all in the green Station Commander, I think we're ready to move on with more <Bold>advanced technologies and ships now</>.
Unlocks superconductors - an essential component for advanced manufacturing.

We have made a major breakthrough in the development of superconducting materials.

This will allow us to fabricate even more complex and high-technology items.
Unlocks robotic freighters and docks, letting you automate the movement of materials between remote parts of your station.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Freighter Dock</> and robotic <Bold>Freighter</>, which can be used to automate the transport of items, parts and materials between remote parts of your station - such as between Miners and your main base.

Construct one or more Docks on your station, and then build at least one Freighter from the Dock's popup menu.

You can then assign any combination of Docks for the selected Freighter to pick up and drop off items.
Unlocks the Equipment Station which lets you manufacture equipment that can installed on your drone to enhance its capabilities

The <Bold>Equipment Station</> is now available to construct from the Build menu.

The Equipment Station lets you craft equipment that can installed on your drone to enhance its capabilities.
Unlocks the ability to a Blueprint from modules selected using the Multi-Select tool which can then be easily placed onto your station.

<Bold>Blueprints</> are now available from the Multi-Select tool popup menu.

Once you have selected multiple modules using the Multi-Select tool you can create a blueprint which can then be placed from the Build menu.
Unlocks the Beam Turret which automates station defence against incoming meteors or enemies.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Beam Defence Turret</> which can be constructed around your stations and sub-stations in order to automatically defend from incoming <Bold>meteors</>, <Bold>enemy drones</> and <Bold>creatures</>.
Unlocks Mk 2 Storage Units which can store considerably more items, materials and parts as well as supply more linked modules due to their faster max item send speed.

<Bold>Mk 2 Storage Units</> have now been unlocked. 

These can store considerably more items, materials and parts as well as supply more linked modules due to their faster max item send speed.
Unlocks the Nano Repair consumable which restores your Drone's hitpoints and can be crafted in the Equipment Station

The <Bold>Nano Repair</> equipment has now been unlocked. 

Craft this consumable in the Equipment Station and equip it in an equipment slot on your drone to restore hitpoints instantly when your drone is damaged.

Our <Bold>Deep Space Scans</> have revealed potentially resource-rich locations spread throughout the system - However we'll need to <Bold>scout these locations</> before we can decide where we should expand our facilities to next...

To do this, we'll need to <Bold>construct</> the following <Bold>scout-ships</>:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}
Our scouting mission has identified the presence of a <Bold>nearby Gas Giant</> that we've named <Bold>Titania...</>

Gas Giants are the ideal place to deploy <Bold>cloud-miners</> and automate the production of <Bold>hydrogen gas</> used in our fusion reactors and starships - so this should be our <Bold>primary objective</> for further expansion.
Unlocks modules and processes required for the production of Hydrogen gas used in Fusion Reactors and starship fuel.

You now have access to <Bold>Hydrogen production</> which is used in fusion reactors and for fuelling starships.

<Bold>Refineries</> can convert <Bold>water</> from <Bold>ice asteroids</> into <Bold>hydrogen gas</>, which can then be piped around your station and either stored or used in <Bold>Fusion Reactors</> to produce large amounts of power.
Unlocks more advanced starship parts and ship classes.
You have unlocked a higher tier of starship construction, including additional starship parts and more advanced ship classes ready to be built from the Shipyard.
Unlocks breakthroughs in Fusion Energy production, giving you access to advanced power generation options.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Fusion Reactor</> which utilises Hydrogen Gas to sustain a fusion reaction and generate large amounts of clean energy.

We highly recommend moving from more primitive energy generation systems onto Fusion as soon as possible to secure your power needs.

Unlocks the Tug Bay and Ship Tugs which will automatically move starships around your station  - such as from a <Bold>Shipyard</> into a <Bold>Fuel Depot</> - or into a <Bold>clear space</> next to your station ready to be shipped.

<Bold>Tug Bays</> will automatically move starships between station modules - such as from a <Bold>Shipyard</> into a <Bold>Fuel Depot</> - or into a <Bold>clear space</> next to your station ready to be shipped.

Use the <Bold>Link</> function to assign a Shipyard to a Fuel Depot or a space near your station and the nearest free tug will automatically be assigned.

Please note that Tugs have a maximum range that they will pick ships up inside - hold Shift to see this.
Unlocks the Power Linker which can be used to connect the power networks of remote parts of your station.
<Bold>Power Linkers</> can be built to link the power grids of remote parts of your station - such as Miners - to your main station and centralize power generation.
Unlocks the <Bold>Production Overview Panel</> which gives you a summary of how many of each <Bold>item, material and part</> in each location your station is <Bold>producing and using</>.

The <Bold>Production Overview Panel</> is a useful tool for optimising your stations.

This screen gives you a summary of how many of each <Bold>item, material and part</> in each location your station is <Bold>producing and using</>, making it easier to locate shortfalls in your production lines.
Unlocks an equippable Energy Shield that can be crafted in the Equipment Station and assigned to a slot on your Drone.

You've unlocked the Energy Shield.

This can be crafted in the Equipment Station and assigned to a slot on your Drone to project a personal force-field which absorbs incoming damage and is regenerated over time.
Unlocks the <Bold>Drone Teleporter</> which can be constructed at your remote bases - such as mines - and used to instantly travel between them.

You have unlocked the <Bold>Drone Teleporter</>.

Construct teleporters on remote areas of your stations to instantly travel between them, and speed up time taken to traverse your factories.

The nearby Gas Giant - Titania - will be the perfect location to <Bold>cloud-mine</> for Hydrogen Gas.

We can use this in our <Bold>Fusion Reactors</> and to <Bold>fuel our ships</> so we can launch much longer-range missions around the system...

We've prepared a number of <Bold>Sensor Packages</> we'd like you to drop into low-orbit around Titania, so we'll need you to build the <Bold>following ships</> to accomplish this:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

The sensor network we deployed has determined what appears to be the <Bold>perfect location</> for us to establish a <Bold>cloud-mining station</> in the upper layers of Titania's atmosphere.

This location has been added to the <Bold>System View</> and you can now establish a <Bold>new station</> there as soon as you have the required resources.

After establishing ourselves in the <Bold>Tau System</>, we conducted tests on our manufacturing capabilities to make sure they survived the journey here.

We then produced several exploration ships and sent them out to scout the local surroundings, discovering a nearby <Bold>Gas Giant</> that we can mine for <Bold>Hydrogen Gas</> for use in our Fusion Reactors and Starship fuel.
Unlocks the Wormhole Terminus module which can be used to link stations in different Zones together.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Wormhole Terminus</> which can be connected to a Terminus in a distant location to form a quantum gateway.

Items, materials and parts can be fed into a Terminus and will appear in the Output of the gateway on the other side.

You can also connect multiple pipes to the input pipe-connectors on one Terminus and they will arrive in the same-numbered output pipe-connectors on the other side - ready to be piped elsewhere in your station.
Unlocks new modules for taking advantage of being in the lower atmosphere of a Gas Giant.

<Bold>Cloud Mining Stations</> let you deploy <Bold>Cloud Miners</> into the atmosphere of a gas giant and automate the collection of large amounts of hydrogen gas.

Construct <Bold>Vortex generators</> inside the atmosphere of <Bold>Gas giants</> to produce large amounts of power at very little cost.
Unlocks new processes for converting Nitratium into explosive compounds ready to be used in military applications.

You can now synthesize the highly explosive bio-compound <Bold>Nitrox</>, which can be produced by refining the <Bold>Nitratium</> recovered from gas-giant flora and fauna and combining it in a <Bold>Refinery</> with <Bold>Oxygen</> extracted from <Bold>Water</>.
Unlocks the Fuel Depot which can be used to fuel starships with Hydrogen and complete higher-level objectives.

You have unlocked the <Bold>Fuel Depot</> which can be supplied with Hydrogen Gas and fuel waiting starships.

You can <Fuelled>fuel</> a starship by dragging it into an empty <Bold>Fuel Depot</> and fuelling will begin automatically.

You can also link a Shipyard to a Fuel Depot to have a free tug automatically move ships into the depot.
Unlocks the Mk 2 Smelter which can process raw materials at a faster rate and increase production.

<Bold>Mk 2 Smelters</> have now been unlocked. 

These can process raw materials into usable metals and other materials at a higher rate and increase the output of your factory immensely.
Unlocks the Mk 2 Miner which can extract ores at a faster rate and increase factory output.

<Bold>Mk 2 Miners</> have now been unlocked. 

These can extract raw materials at a higher rate and increase the output of your factory immensely.
Unlocks an equippable <Bold>Missile Launcher</> that can be crafted in the <Bold>Equipment Station</> and assigned to a slot on your Drone.

You've unlocked the <Bold>Missile Launcher</>.

This can be crafted in the <Bold>Equipment Station</> and assigned to a slot on your Drone to fire <Bold>explosive-tipped missiles</> at enemies.
Things are progressing well here, but we're running low on <Bold>raw resources</> so we need to find <Bold>additional mining locations</> we can exploit...
To explore further afield we'll need to dispatch scout-ships which have been <Bold>fuelled</>, as well as <Bold>tanker-ships</> which can refuel them on their journey...

Let us know when you've produced the <Bold>following ships</>:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

Our expedition has discovered a <Bold>resource-rich mining location</> in the secondary Asteroid Belt which will greatly increase our supply of raw materials and enable us to expand even further.

This location has been added to the <Bold>System View</> and you can now establish a <Bold>new station</> there as soon as you have the required resources.
Unlocks the Plasma Forge which can be used to fuse metallic elements together into superstrong alloys.
The <Bold>Plasma Forge</> has now been unlocked. Use this to combine elements together to form advanced <Bold>alloys</>.
Unlocks more advanced starship parts and ship classes.
You have unlocked a higher tier of starship construction, including additional starship parts and more advanced ship classes ready to be built from the Shipyard.
Unlocks the Bio-Extractor which can automate the extraction of biological compounds from larger flora and fauna.
The <Bold>Bio Extractor</> can be used to automate the extraction of <Bold>Nitratium</> from large gas-giant flora in order to automate large-scale <Bold>Nitrox</> production.
Unlocks the Mk 2 Freighter Dock and Mk 2 Freighter which can transport more items as well as liquids and gases around your station.

<Bold>Mk 2 Freighter Docks</> can store considerably more items ready for transport, as well as gases and liquids. They can also output items at a faster rate, letting you link more modules to them and avoid bottlenecks.

<Bold>Mk 2 Freighters</> can be constructed from Mk 2 Docks, and these can also transport more items at higher speeds, as well as gases and liquids too.
Enables larger blueprint area and a higher maximum number of modules inside a blueprint
You have unlocked expanded blueprints, which lets you select and add <Bold>more modules</> to a blueprint, as well as an expanded blueprint <Bold>area</>.
Unlocks the <Bold>Recycler</> which you can feed unwanted resources into in exhange for <Bold>Tokens</> that you can spend on various rewards.

The <Bold>Recycler</> has been unlocked.

Feed unwanted resources into this module in exchange for <Bold>Tokens</> that you can spend on various rewards.
Unlocks the <Bold>Laboratory</> and the ability to research <Bold>alternative recipes</> for producing various items, materials and parts

The <Bold>Laboratory</> has been unlocked.

Feed items, parts and materials into this module for analysis and you can unlock <Bold>alternative</> and <Bold>more efficient</> recipes for producing them.
The <Bold>Ice Planet Glacialis</> is the perfect location to automate the harvesting of <Bold>water ice</> for use in oxygen production and other industries...
However, the rings of this planet are highly <Bold>unstable</>, so we'll need to deploy more <Bold>advanced ships and sensors</> to locate a stable zone we can establish a station within...

<Bold>Neutron Explorers</> are perfect for this task, and we can use the new <Bold>Stratos Prospecters</> to retrieve samples from deep within the ring. Please produce the following:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

We believe that we've identified a stable zone deep within the rings of <Bold>Glacialis</> that will enable us to automate the mining of Water Ice to be used in our production chains.

This location has been added to the <Bold>System View</> and you can now establish a <Bold>new station</> there as soon as you have the required resources.
Unlocks highly advanced manufacturing processes providing access to new items, materials and parts.

<Bold>Manufactories</> can now be constructed from the Build menu.

These giant production machines can produce some of the largest and most complex parts and items you'll need for more advanced modules and starships.
Unlocks ultra-high-speed supercomputing technologies which power larger starships and advanced station modules.
You've now unlocked Supercomputers which are an essential component in the most advanced module and starship production.
Unlocks the ability to construct larger ship classes.

<Bold>Medium Shipyards</> are now available for you to fulfil ever-larger and more complex starship orders.

Note: Larger ships may require <Bold>Micro Fusion Reactors</> to be installed. These ships must be fuelled quickly after completion to avoid catastrophic reactor meltdown.
Unlocks more powerful automated base defences.

Enhanced Base Defences are now available for construction.

We recommend building enhanced <Bold>Missile Defence Turrets</> on your most vulnerable stations to safely defend against larger groups of enemies.
Unlocks the <Bold>Mk 3 Storage Unit</> and <Bold>Mk 2 Storage Tank</> which can store even more items and outputs items at a faster rate.

<Bold>Mk 3 Storage Units</> and <Bold>Mk 2 Storage Tanks</> have now been unlocked. 

These can store considerably more items, materials and parts as well as supply more linked modules due to their faster max item send speed.
Unlocks the Micro Drone which when equipped will shoot down incoming projectiles.

The <Bold>Defence Micro Drone</> has now been unlocked. 

This can be crafted in the Equipment Station and when equipped can shoot down incoming projectiles.
Its time to <Bold>expand our operations</> here once again, Station Commander, and for that we'll need more <Bold>raw materials...</>

We propose to dispatch <Bold>additional scouting missions</> to the following locations:

One mission will explore the far distant, <Bold>third Asteroid Belt</>, while the other mission will investigate some <Bold>strange energy readings</> we've detected from the <Bold>Lava Planet</> we've named <Bold>Cerberus...</>

These are <Bold>hazardous, long-distance missions</>, so we we'll need additional <Bold>heavy ships</> to successfully carry them out. Please construct the <Bold>following ships:</>

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

We have <Bold>good news</> and <Bold>bad news</> Commander: The expedition to the most distant Asteroid Belt was a success, and this location has been added to your <Bold>System View</> for immediate expansion...

However, we have <Bold>lost all contact</> with the ships sent to the <Bold>Lava Planet Cerberus</>, and we fear that they have all been <Bold>destroyed</> by an <Bold>unknown hostile force</>. 

The <Bold>energy readings</> coming from this location cannot be ignored however, so we will have to <Bold>mount another mission</> to this location in the future.

After expanding into the Gas Giant Titania, we discovered that the rings of a nearby Ice Planet contain everything we need to expand and automate our water-to-oxygen pipeline.

If we hope to mass-produce explosives and weapons, this is going to have to be our next destination.
Unlocks the ability to produce warheads, missiles and the Ammo Depot to install them into military-grade starships.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Ammo Factory</> and <Bold>Ammo Depot</>.

<Armed>Ship Ammo</> is produced in the <Bold>Ammo Factory</> and loaded into a ship from the <Bold>Ammo Depot</>.

As with Fuel Depots, you can link a module to an Ammo Depot and nearby tugs will automatically transport ships between them.
Unlocks the ability to construct military starships.

You have now unlocked Military Starships which must be provided with the required Ammo.

Ammo is produced in the Ammo Factory, and can be deployed from the Ammo Depot.
Unlocks the <Bold>Mk 3 Miner</> and <Bold>Mk 2 Bio-Extractor</> to further increase maximum raw material extraction rate.

<Bold>Mk 3 Miners</> and <Bold>Mk 2 Bio-Extractors</> have now been unlocked. 

These can extract raw materials at a higher rate and increase the output of your factory immensely.
Unlocks the Mk 2 Fuel Depot which has a faster fuel transfer rate and fuel larger starships more efficiently.

The <Bold>Mk 2 Fuel Depot</> has now been unlocked.

This module has a faster fuel transfer rate and can fuel larger starships more efficiently.
Unlocks the Mk 3 Freighter Dock and Mk 3 Freighter which can transport items even faster around your stations.

<Bold>Mk 3 Freighter Docks</> can store considerably more items ready for transport. They can also output items at a faster rate, letting you link more modules to them and avoid bottlenecks.

<Bold>Mk 3 Freighters</> can be constructed from Mk 3 Docks, and these can also transport more items at higher speeds, as well as having a mounted Beam Turret for defence against nearby enemies.

We've still had <Bold>no contact</> from the mission sent to the <Bold>Lava Planet Cerberus</>, so we have no choice but to make sure that any future operations sent to this area can defend themselves against <Bold>hostile threats...</>
Energy readings point to this area being a potential source of <Bold>Exotic Matter</> however, so we must mount <Bold>another expedition</> to investigate this further...

With this in mind we recommend that we assemble a <Bold>military force</> to explore this area and find the source of the exotic readings emanating from the region. Please build the following ships:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

Our assault mission to <Bold>Cerberus</> has been able to establish a <Bold>beach-head</> in orbit around the planet, and the source of the energy readings has been identified:

A vast <Bold>debris field</> made from the <Bold>wrecks of countless starships</> orbits the planet - we believe these are the remnants of an ancient war between unknown forces.

Our forces have confirmed the presence of <Bold>Exotic Matter</> in and around these wrecks, which will be essential if we want to begin the production of <Bold>Antimatter</>.

Our forces also discovered an ancient <Bold>robot production facility</> within this area, and we believe this is where most of the <Bold>hostile robots</> we've encountered in this system are coming from.
Unlocks processes for processing <Bold>radioactive raw materials</> into useable items.

You have now unlocked the ability to process <Bold>Uranium</>.

This is a <Bold>highly radioactive</> substance that will <Bold>damage your drone</> unless you have <Bold>Radiation Filters</> installed.
Unlocks the <Bold>Particle Accelerator</> which lets you convert radioactive materials into <Bold>Antimatter</>.

<Bold>Antimatter</> is generated inside the <Bold>Particle Accelerator</>. This is formed from a <Bold>Control Centre</> and a ring of <Bold>Conduit</> running through one or more <Bold>Towers</>.

The <Bold>larger</> the particle accelerator loop you build, the <Bold>faster</> you can generate antimatter - but the <Bold>more power</> is required.
Unlocks the <Bold>Antimatter Reactor</> which lets you generate huge amounts of <Bold>power</> from <Bold>antimatter</>.

You now have access to the <Bold>Antimatter Reactor</> which can consume <Bold>antimatter</> to produce <Bold>vast quantities of energy</>.

This process does produce a large amount of <Bold>nuclear waste</> however which you will need to remove and process to prevent radioactive build-ups.
Unlocks processes required for converting <Bold>nuclear waste</> into <Bold>usable materials and items</>.
You have now unlocked the ability to process <Bold>Nuclear Waste</> byproducts into <Bold>usable items and materials</>.
Unlocks additional <Bold>military-grade</> starship parts and ship classes.
You have unlocked a higher tier of <Bold>military starship</> construction, including additional starship parts and more advanced ship classes ready to be built from the <Bold>Shipyard</>.
Unlocks technologies for <Bold>protecting</> your Drone and Station Modules from the harmful effects of <Bold>radiation</>.

Various technologies for <Bold>protecting</> your Drone and Station Modules from the harmful effects of <Bold>radiation</> have been unlocked.

<Bold>Radiation Filters</> will protect your Drone from external <Bold>radiation damage</>, but only last for a short time before needing to be <Bold>replaced</>.
Unlocks the ability to safely store and contain unstable or radioactive elements.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Containment Chamber</>.

As long as it is <Bold>powered</>, this device can be used to safely store <Bold>Antimatter and radioactive elements</> without losing containment or damaging nearby machines.
Unlocks <Bold>force-field-based technologies</> which can be used to protect your station from external threats.
You have now unlocked <Bold>Force-Field Generators</>, which can be used to <Bold>protect your stations</> from all forms of damage - including <Bold>firestorms and electrical storms</>.

If we are to survive in this system, its imperative that the <Bold>robot production facility</> our forces discovered in orbit around <Bold>Cerberus</> is <Bold>neutralized</>.

However, this complex is heavily guarded by <Bold>hostile robot patrols</> left over from an ancient war...

Its time to take the gloves off, Station Commander, and perform a <Bold>surgical strike</> with a task-force of powerful <Bold>military capital ships</> - we think the following will be sufficient to get the job done:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

Mission Complete, Station Commander: <Bold>Target Destroyed.</>

Because of your success in this mission, we've decided to promote you to the rank of <Bold>Station Captain!</>

With the main source of hostiles neutralized in this system - and with the technologies you have unlocked so far - its time to move onto the <Bold>next phase</> of our operations in the TAU system: 

Constructing our <Bold>Intergalactic Arkship</> and escaping this galaxy before <Bold>The Void</> catches up with us again.

After <Bold>losing contact</> with our long-range scouting mission, we discovered that an ancient <Bold>automated robot production facility</> is still operational near the <Bold>Lava Planet Cerberus</>.

This is likely the source of most of the <Bold>hostile robots</> we've encountered in the system, so our next course of action must be to mount a <Bold>military operation</> and eliminate it.
We have made a significant scientific breakthrough in <Bold>Quantum Physics</>, and unlocked several <Bold>new parts and materials</> that can be used in further technologies.
Unlocks the <Bold>Servitor Station</> which deploys a programmable <Bold>robotic AI helper</>.

The <Bold>Servitor Station</> deploys a helpful <Bold>AI-powered robot</> that can be set to automatically perform tasks around your station such as <Bold>repairing damaged modules</>, aligning <Bold>solar panels</> and <Bold>collecting resources</> when <Bold>linked</> to a suitable destination module.
A particularly useful function for the Servitor is to automate the collection of <Bold>Exotic Matter</> from the <Bold>Junkyard Zone</>.
Unlocks the <Bold>Mk 2 Wormhole</> which can transport more items, gases and liquids at a <Bold>faster rate</>.

<Bold>Mk 2 Wormholes</> have now been unlocked. 

These can transport more items, gases and liquids between remote parts of your stations at a faster rate.
Unlocks the <Bold>Quantum Storage</> device which lets you feed in items and parts and then <Bold>access them from anywhere</> via your <Bold>Drone's inventory</>.

<Bold>Quantum Storage</> units have now been unlocked. 

Feed items and materials into this device and <Bold>access them anywhere</> from your <Bold>Drone's inventory</>.
Unlocks the <Bold>Centrifuge</> which can be used to enrich <Bold>waste products</> and convert them into <Bold>useable materials</>.

The <Bold>Centrifuge</> has now been unlocked. 

This device can be used to <Bold>enrich waste products</> and convert them into <Bold>usable materials</>.
<Bold>The Arkship</> will be our race's <Bold>greatest achievement</> - and our salvation - but its construction will take everything we have.

The first step will be constructing an <Bold>Arkship Terminal</>, which will serve as a nexus to channel items, parts and materials into the project. This is now available to construct from the <Bold>Build menu</>.

We've also picked up some <Bold>interesting readings</> from the orbit of the gas giant <Bold>Scylla</> - we recommend dispatching an <Bold>exploration mission</> there immediately with the following ships:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

Well done Station Commander, the Arkship Terminal is now <Bold>fully operational</>.

When you're ready, you can start feeding in the required items, parts and materials and take us to the <Bold>next stage</> of operation.

Our <Bold>exploration mission</> to the gas giant <Bold>Scylla</> has also discovered an extremely <Bold>mineral-rich moon</> orbiting the planet - <Bold>Helion</> - and this location has been added to the System Map ready for <Bold>immediate expansion</>.

After neutralising an <Bold>ancient robot production facility</> in orbit around the <Bold>Lava Planet Cerberus</> - and developing many new manufacturing technologies - we believe we are finally ready to start production on our <Bold>Intergalactic Arkship</> and escape this doomed galaxy forever.

This is not going to be easy, however, and <Bold>The Void</> has <Bold>accelerated its expansion</> - so we may not have as much time as we hoped...
Researches <Bold>Tungten Carbide</> and related materials for extreme damage resistance.

We've completed research into the material <Bold>Tungsten Carbide</>.

This very dense, tough material can be used in extreme environments and high pressure systems.
Unlocks the <Bold>Component Factory</> module, which can produce large <Bold>Starship</> and <Bold>Arkship components</>.

The <Bold>Component Factory</> has been unlocked.

This module is used to produce larger <Bold>Starship</> and <Bold>Arkship components</> which will require a tug to install into their destination.
Unlocks the <Bold>Large Shipyard</>, which can construct the largest classes of ships.

The <Bold>Large Shipyard</> has been unlocked.

This can construct the very largest classes of starship, which will require a <Bold>large tug</> to move around your station.
Unlocks the <Bold>Large Tug Bay</> and <Bold>Large Ship Tugs</> which can transport the largest ships around your station.
You have unlocked the <Bold>Large Tug Bay</> and <Bold>Large Ship Tugs</> which can be used to transport even the largest ships around your station.
Unlocks the <Bold>Exoplanet Ops Centre</> which can deploy <Bold>Planetary Lifters</> to fetch resources from the surface of compatible planets.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Exoplanet Ops Centre</>.

This module can deploy multiple <Bold>Planetary Lifters</> which can be set to fetch resources from the surface of compatible planets.
Unlocks <Bold>Mark 2 Pipes</> and an <Bold>increased gas/fluid output rate</> to speed up how fast you can transport gases and fluids around your station.

You have unlocked <Bold>Mark 2 Pipes</> and an <Bold>increased gas/fluid output rate</>.

Together these will vastly speed up how fast you can transport gases and fluids around your station.
Unlocks the <Bold>Mk 3 Fuel Depot</> which has a faster fuel transfer rate and can supply <Bold>Antimatter</> to larger ships, as well as the Crusader Auxilliary, a Capital-class resupply ship.

The <Bold>Mk 3 Fuel Depot</> has now been unlocked.

This module has a <Bold>faster fuel transfer rate</> and can both store and supply <Bold>Antimatter</> to the largest starships.

You can now also construct the Crusader Auxilliary, a Capital-class resupply ship which can refuel both fusion and antimatter-based starships.
Unlocks the <Bold>Quantum Extractor</> which can extract Exotic Matter directly from a Quantum Rift

The <Bold>Quantum Extractor</> has now been unlocked.

Construct this advanced device onto <Bold>Quantum Rifts</> you can find in locations like the <Bold>Junkyard</> to automate large-scale extraction of <Bold>Exotic Matter</>.
Commander, all of our <Bold>deep-space scanning</> stations have just <Bold>gone dark</>, and we are completely blind to what is happening in this sector of space...

We can patch this gap with a network of our most powerful <Bold>science and scanning ships</>, along with an appropriate escort of military and resupply ships:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

While this mission is underway, it's also <Bold>vital</> that you continue construction of our Intergalactic Arkship Project.

The next phase of the project will be building the <Bold>Arkship Dock</>, ready to begin construction of the Arkship itself.

<Bold>Bad news</>, Commander...

We've just heard back from the fleet we dispatched to the edge of the system, and it's official: <Bold>The Void has arrived...</>
The Void's last <Bold>Expansion Phase</> has halted at the edge of this system, but another Expansion could occur at any time... we need to get the Arkship completed as soon as we can, Commander!

Analysis has confirmed that a station could survive on the edge of The Void's event horizon, and could provide invaluable insight into the inner workings of this mysterious cosmic entity...

This location has been added to your <Bold>System Map</>.
Unlocks the <Bold>Space Elevator</> - a massive structure that can lift valuable resources from the surface of a planet.

You have unlocked the <Bold>Space Elevator</>.

This massive orbital structure is capable of lifting valuable items, materials and parts from the surface of a planet, ready to be used in your station.
Unlocks materials, items and parts related to <Bold>Quantum Destabilization</> - a highly experimental technology which has the power to <Bold>disrupt cosmic phenomena</> such as black holes.

We have completed research into the field of Quantum Destabilization.

According to our scientists, this highly experimental technology has the power to disrupt quantum entities - such as singularities - and may help us in our fight against The Void.
Unlocks the <Bold>Battlecruiser class</> of starship - a massive capital-class ship that can mount the heaviest experimental weaponry.

You have unlocked the Battlecruiser class of starship.

This massive capital-class ship can mount the heaviest experimental weaponry and will be invaluable in our fight against The Void.
Unlocks the <Bold>Magnetic Accelerator</> which can target and destroy <Bold>Void Anomalies</> you may encounter at The Void's event horizon location.

You have unlocked the <Bold>Magnetic Accelerator</>.

This massive cannon can fire <Bold>Quantum Implosion Ammo</> at the <Bold>Void Anomalies</> you may encounter at The Void's <Bold>Event Horizon location</>.

When destroyed, these anomalies may leave behind the rare and valuable material <Bold>Neutronium</>.
Unlocks the ability to process <Bold>Neutronium</> into powerful <Bold>hyperdrive fuel</> that can be used in intergalactic star-drives.

You have unlocked the ability to process <Bold>Neutronium</>.

This rare and valuable stellar substance is found in the core of stars and black holes, and can be refined into <Bold>Hyperdrive Fuel</> which can power intergalactic star-drives.
Unlocks the <Bold>Antimatter Lazer</> which is a powerful beam weapon that can be crafted from the <Bold>Equipment Station</>.

You have now unlocked the <Bold>Antimatter Lazer</>.

This is an extremely powerful beam weapon that can be crafted from the <Bold>Equipment Station</> and can be used to defend yourself from even the most powerful enemies.

With our recent advancements in <Bold>Quantum Destablization</> technology, it may actually be possible to temporarily delay The Void's next expansion phase - giving us enough time to complete the <Bold>Arkship</> and escape this galaxy...

This will require a flotilla of our most <Bold>powerful battlecruisers</> - fitted with this devastating weapons technology - all working in unison:

{REQUIRED_SHIPS}

Now that the <Bold>Arkship Dock</> is complete, its time to put all of our efforts into building the <Bold>Arkship</> itself - use every means at your disposal Commander, <Bold>we may not have much time!</>

<Bold>The Arkship is complete</>, Commander - truly an <Bold>amazing accomplishment!</>

All that remains is to power and fuel its <Bold>Intergalactic Stardrive</> - then we will be ready to <Bold>launch</>.
Fuel and power the Intergalactic Arkship's Hyper-drive and escape the galaxy - and The Void - forever...

With the Arkship complete, we now have everything we need to escape the galaxy - and The Void - forever.

All that remains is to <Bold>power and fuel</> the Arkship's Intergalactic <Bold>Hyperdrive</> with neutronium-based fuel.
This experimental drive will require <Bold>massive amounts of power</> to initialise - so you will need to use all of your engineering abilities to accomplish this.
Although our Battlecruisers have bought us some time, The Void could start its next <Bold>Expansion Phase</> at any time, so we recommend moving with <Bold>all haste</>, Commander...
Commander, the Arkship is fuelled, powered and ready to launch!

But there's something you should know - we've been receiving communications from inside The Void, and its been confirmed: The people from our home system are still alive somehow - inside The Void - transcribed into a quantum state...

According to them, The Void is NOT the great destroyer that we believed...

Instead, it seems to be a vast machine created aeons ago to achieve Singularity for everyone in this galaxy... and its almost ready to activate...

Its up to you now, Commander...

Do we use the Arkship to join our lost kin inside The Void - or to escape this galaxy forever...?
You can hide the upper level of your station by holding <ACTION=HideUpperLevel_B> or <ACTION=HideUpperLevel_B_Alt>
You can collect multiple asteroids easily by holding <Bold>SHIFT</> and dragging with <Bold>LMB</>
Use the <Bold>Sensor View</> to locate nearby resources or enemies by holding <ACTION=Sensors> or <ACTION=Sensors ALT>
Pressing <ACTION=Stop> while in <Bold>Connect Mode</> will clear all connections from the selected module
You can move items from a hovered object into your drone's inventory using <ACTION=Transfer_To_Drone>
You can teleport back to the Hub at any time by holding <ACTION=Home>
Use the <ACTION=Transfer_From_Drone> and <ACTION=Transfer_To_Drone> hotkeys to quickly move items to and from your drone and the currently hovered or selected object
The <Bold>Station Overview</> lets you quickly see how your station is performing (Hold <ACTION=Show Status>)
Quickly switch hovered or selected modules on and off using <ACTION=Toggle Power>
Add a waypoint using <ACTION=Create Waypoint> while in the <Bold>Map View</>
Rotate the currently placing module using <ACTION=Rotate Left>
The <Bold>Codex</> contains a lot of useful information including all previously seen tutorial videos
Most recipes can be <Bold>synthesized</> directly from your drone's inventory (hotkey: <ACTION=Inventory>)
You can create a custom task by clicking the '+' button on the main toolbar
You can align multiple <Bold>solar generators</> by using <Bold>Shift + LMB</>
You can <Bold>move</> most buildings by using <Bold>CTRL + X</>
Light and strong general-purpose building material used in station and starship construction
Flexible carbon nano-material which can be used as a basis for many other materials
Rare metal used in all forms of electronics and circuitry
Raw ore that can be smelted into titanium metal used in construction
Raw ore that can be smelted into usable metal
Raw material used to produce glass-fibre and other materials
Quantum-based computing matrix used for advanced station modules and starships
General-purpose outer-hull plates used in both station modules and starship construction
Ultra-high-tensile framework used in more advanced construction projects and starships
Basic nano-wafer circuitry used to build advanced computational matrixes
Carbon-based ore that can be smelted into stable carbon compounds
Carbon lattice material that can be further processed into useful composites
Basic fibrous polymer material used to create more advanced products
High-capacity optical cabling used in computing and many other applications
Small but powerful booster engine used in simpler starship construction
Extremely powerful engine used in the largest and most advanced starships
Small fuel tank generally fitted on simpler starships
Small cargo pod generally fitted on simpler starships
Impure water ice crystals that can be refined into pure water
Base element used in fusion reactors and starship fuel
Reactive gaseous element used in explosive compounds
An advanced hull plating which is both incredibly strong and flexible when required
High-tensile framework used in more basic construction projects and simple starships
Crystalline matrix used in superconductors and high-tensile structures
Ultra-high-capacity conductor used for advanced station modules and product manufacturing
This super-strong epoxy is used to bond many materials and products together
Bio-compound that can be harvested from gas-giant fauna and processed into explosives
Powerful mini reactor capable of powering larger starships
Powerful engine used by larger starships
Highly concentrated explosive used in weapons production
Ultra-strong carbon-based nano material used in pipes and cables
Ultra-high-tech plating used in starship and station module construction
Heavy high-tensile framework used in larger starships
Explosive module used in weapons production
General purpose missile used by military starships
Long-range missile launcher for military ships
Protective forcefield generator for advanced starships
This pinnacle of our engineering technology can be used to generate incredible amounts of power... or destruction.
Incredibly hard nuclear byproduct used in the production of railgun slugs
Extremely radioactive nuclear by-product of certain products and reactions
Depleted uranium slugs fired at relativistic speeds from a ship-mounted railgun launcher
Fires depleted uranium slugs at near-relativistic speeds
Highly corrosive substance used for scrubbing radioactive materials
Pure water that can be converted into various gases
Super-strong aerodynamic wing that allows ships to manoeuvre in a planet's atmosphere
Small but advanced engine which allows a spacecraft to function in space and in a planet's atmosphere
Raw ore that can be smelted into tungsten metal
Dense metal that can be used to form alloys
Raw radioactive ore that can be refined into pure Uranium
Highly radioactive metal used in the production of Antimatter
Incredibly tough alloy of titanium and tungsten
Radioactive consumable used in the Particle Accelerator to generate Antimatter
Exotic crystalline substrate used in quantum devices
Small but extremely powerful reactor used in the largest and most advanced starships.
Components to complete the Dock stage of the Arkship Terminal
Advanced sensor array used by research vessels
Medium fuel tank for larger starships
Disposable hypersonic probe used to collect scientific data
Advanced sensor cluster that can detect quantum instabilities and other phenomena
Super dense alloy of tungsten and carbon used in high-pressure systems
Damage-resistant plating designed to resist extreme environments and high pressure systems.
Exotic matter-based warhead used in quantum ammunition
Exotic-matter based ammunition with the potential to destabilize quantum structures
Powerful weapon that can introduce instabilities in quantum structures such as singularities
Containment vessel for supplying large antimatter-fuelled starships
Incredibly strong carbon-nanotube-based cable used in mega-structures
Can be inserted into compatible factories to provide a large increase in efficiency
Ultra-dense and highly radioactive stellar matter formed in black holes and the cores of stars.

<Bold>Matter Printers</> can convert raw materials into more complex items ready to be used in further production chains.

Use the <Bold>connect</> function to automatically feed the output of your <Bold>smelters</> into matter printers to speed up production.

The <Bold>Artifact Analyzer</> is now available.

Feed any <Bold>Alien Artifacts</> you may find into this unit to unlock important new technologies and upgrades.
You can now construct <Bold>Fabricators</> in order to produce more complex items and simple starship parts.
<Bold>Energy Storage</> modules will store excess energy produced by your station ready to restore energy if you lose power.

You can now automate raw material extraction by constructing <Bold>Miners</> onto <Bold>Ore Nodes</> located on some larger asteroids.

Miners have <Bold>connection points</> which can be <Bold>built on</> to create mining sub-stations that serve your main station.

The <Bold>Small Shipyard</> has now been unlocked.

Smaller starships can be constructed here to satisfy orders for <Bold>starships</>.

Construct <Bold>Freighter Docks</> to connect remote parts of your station such as miners and further automate resource processing.

<Bold>Freighters</> can be built from any freighter dock and can then be ordered to pick up and drop off from any docks in the current zone.
<Bold>Defence Turrets</> can be constructed around your station (and remote sub-stations) to automatically defend from incoming <Bold>meteors</>, <Bold>enemy drones</> and <Bold>creatures</>.

You now have access to <Bold>Hydrogen production</> which is used in fusion reactors and starship fuel.

<Bold>Refineries</> can convert <Bold>water</> from <Bold>ice asteroids</> into <Bold>hydrogen gas</>, which can then be piped around your station and either stored or used in <Bold>Fusion Reactors</> to produce large amounts of power.
<Bold>Power Linkers</> can be built to link the power grids of remote parts of your station - such as Miners - to your main station and centralize power generation.

Additional <Bold>locations</> are now available to you to found new stations at. These can be accessed from the <Bold>System Map</>.

More locations will become available as your station grows, allowing access to new resource types.
Stations in other locations can be connected together via <Bold>Womhole Terminus</>, which allows movement of items, parts and volatiles between zones to be automated.

You may now receive orders for starships that have been <Fuelled>Fuelled</>.

You can <Fuelled>fuel</> a starship by dragging it into a <Bold>Fuel Depot</> that has been supplied with <Bold>Hydrogen Gas</>.

<Bold>Tug Bays</> will automatically move starships between station modules - such as from a <Bold>Shipyard</> into a <Bold>Fuel Depot</> - or into a <Bold>clear space</> next to your station ready to be shipped.

Use the <Bold>Connect</> function to assign a Shipyard to a Fuel Depot or a space near your station and the nearest free tug will automatically be assigned.

<Bold>Cloud Mining Stations</> let you deploy <Bold>Cloud Miners</> into the atmosphere of a gas giant and automate the collection of large amounts of hydrogen gas.

Construct <Bold>Vortex generators</> inside the atmosphere of <Bold>Gas giants</> to produce large amounts of power at very little cost.

You can now synthesize the highly explosive bio-compound <Bold>Nitrox</>, which can be produced by refining the <Bold>Nitratium</> recovered from gas-giant flora and fauna and combining it in a <Bold>Refinery</> with <Bold>Oxygen</> extracted from <Bold>Water</>.
Additional mining locations are now available, which give access to new resources - such as the rare metal <Bold>Tungsten</> which is used to create <Bold>Superalloy</>.
The <Bold>Plasma Forge</> has now been unlocked. Use this to combine elements together to form advanced <Bold>alloys</>.
The <Bold>Bio Extractor</> can be used to automate the extraction of <Bold>Nitratium</> from large gas-giant flora in order to automate large-scale <Bold>Nitrox</> production.
<Bold>Manufactories</> can now be constructed, allowing the most complex parts to be assembled.

<Bold>Medium Shipyards</> are now available for you to fulfil ever-larger and more complex starship orders.

Note: Larger ships may require <Bold>Micro Fusion Reactors</> to be installed. These ships must be fuelled quickly after completion to avoid catasptrophic reactor meltdown.
The <Bold>Glacialis Ice Ring</> is the ideal location to automate the mining of larger <Bold>Ice Asteroids</> used in <Bold>Oxygen</> production.
We also recommend building enhanced <Bold>Missile Defence Turrets</> on your most vulnerable stations to safely defend against larger groups of enemies.

You may now receive orders for <Armed>Military Starships</> which need to be supplied with <Armed>ammunition</>.

<Armed>Ship Ammo</> is produced in the <Bold>Ammo Factory</> and loaded into a ship from the <Bold>Ammo Depot</>.

The <Bold>Junkyard</> zone has been unlocked. 

This is a very dangerous sector of space swept by frequent firestorms, so you may want to construct <Bold>Force-Field Generators</> to protect your stations in this area.

You now have access to <Bold>antimatter</> production - an incredibly powerful force which can be used to generate huge amounts of energy - or to create weapons of mass destruction.

Antimatter is extremely unstable and must be stored in a powered <Bold>Containment Chamber</> - or it will <bold>explode</> after a short time.

Antimatter is generated inside the <Bold>Particle Accelerator</>. This is formed from a <Bold>Control Centre</> and a ring of <Bold>Conduit</> running through one or more <Bold>Towers</>.

The <Bold>larger</> the particle accelerator loop you build, the <Bold>faster</> you can generate antimatter - but the <Bold>more power</> is required.

The <Bold>Servitor Station</> deploys a helpful <Bold>AI-powered robot</> that can be set to automatically perform tasks around your station such as <Bold>repairing damaged modules</>, aligning <Bold>solar panels</> and <Bold>collecting resources</> when <Bold>linked</> to a suitable destination module.
High capacity solar power cells <Bold>increase energy</> generated from all <Bold>solar sources</>
Overcharges your energy shield allowing more incoming damage to be absorbed.
Increases the <Bold>maximum weight</> your drone can <Bold>carry</>
Adds a layer of <Bold>ultra-hard diamond film</> to your drone's outer casement, increasing <Bold>overall survivability</>
Increases the available <Bold>inventory size</> of your drone, letting you <Bold>store more items</>
Increases the top speed of your Drone when using the <Bold>Afterburner</>

To build new modules on your station, enter <Bold>Build Mode</> using the Build option on the <Bold>Mode Bar</> at the bottom of the screen or press the <Bold>Build hotkey</>.

Choose a <Bold>Build Category</> to see all available modules in that section, and then choose an option from the list to enter <Bold>Placing Mode</>.

If you have the required <Bold>parts</> in your <Bold>Drone's inventory</>, you can click to build, or <Bold>drag</> to automatically add <Bold>connectors</>.

When starting out, the main way to <Bold>gather resources</> is to feed <Bold>asteroids</> and other objects into an <Bold>Atomizer module.</>

Use <Bold>left-drag</> to drag a single object to your <Bold>Atomizer</> and drop into the opening.

You can also <Bold>Shift-Left-Click</> to drag <Bold>multiple objects</> up to the <Bold>maximum carry weight</> of your drone.

Most <Bold>production modules</> such as <Bold>Smelters</> need to have a <Bold>Recipe</> selected to start functioning.

To do this, select the module and click on the production section, then choose the required recipe from the list.

When the module has the required Input items or materials it will begin production, and completed items will appear in the <Bold>Output section</>.

Station modules that require, store or output <Bold>volatiles</> such as Hydrogen Gas will have one or more <Bold>Pipe Connections</>.

You can connect these to other modules using the <Bold>Pipe</> tool in the <Bold>Build > General</> menu.

Pipes will only <Bold>flow</> in <Bold>one direction</>, which can be easily seen using the <Bold>Station Status</> View (Left CTRL).

You can change the flow direction of any pipe by clicking the <Bold>flip pipe direction</> button on the pipe's popup menu, or quickly using the <Bold>H hotkey</> with any hovered or selected pipe.

You can use <Bold>Pipe Junctions</> to create pipe <Bold>networks</> that feed multiple modules.

Pipe Junctions can also be <Bold>stacked</> on top of each other to direct pipes over the top of each other.

You have unlocked a <Bold>Module Upgrade</>.

Some station modules can be <Bold>upgraded</> to increase production efficiency and output if you have the required materials.

Click the upgrade required from the module's properties window to upgrade the module to the new version.

To speed up resource collection you can now construct <Bold>Miners</> onto the <Bold>resource nodes</> you may find on larger asteroids.

Miners can have other <Bold>station modules</> built onto them to create <Bold>sub-stations</> which can supply your main base with resources.

Later in the game you will be able to automate moving resources between miners and your station using <Bold>Freighters</>.

You have now unlocked a new <Bold>Location</> where you can found a <Bold>new station</>.

New locations can provide access to <Bold>new or rare resource types</>, and can be accessed by clicking the <Bold>New Station</> button in the <Bold>station toolbar</>, or from the <Bold>System View</>.

<Bold>Be warned:</> These locations can also harbour more <Bold>deadly threats and events</> which will require you to protect your stations more carefully.

Most recipes can be <Bold>synthesized</> directly from your Inventory (Hotkey = <Bold>TAB</>).

This is done by opening the <Bold>drone inventory</> and clicking the <Bold>synthesizer</> tab.

Select the recipe from the list, and if you have the required materials you can click the button to start the process.

You can automatically repeat the process by toggling the <Bold>repeat</> button to the right.

<Bold>Tugs</> can be used to automate moving ships around your station.

You can use the <Bold>Link</> function to link a <Bold>shipyard</> to another module such as a <Bold>fuel bay</> or <Bold>ammo depot</>, or to an <Bold>empty space</> near your station.

If a tug is in range of a completed ship in one of these connected modules it will automatically pick up and transfer the ship to the correct destination.

Larger ships can have one or more <Bold>micro fusion reactor</> components.

Once completed, these will begin to go <Bold>critical</>, and will <Bold>explode</> if allowed to fully melt down.

To avoid this the ship must be <Bold>fully fuelled</> in a <Bold>Fuel Bay</> before the timer runs out.

To remove a module link, enter <Bold>Link mode</> with <Bold>F</> or the toolbar, select a module that you have previously linked, and then select the destination module you want to unlink from it.

Hold <Bold>Shift</> to quickly un-link a module from multiple destinations.

You can also <Bold>remove all links</> by selecting a module in Link mode and pressing <Bold>X</>.

If you want more control over exactly what will be sent to Storage Units or Factories, you can use the <Bold>Item Filters</> panel.

From here you can highlight any inventory slot and choose which items can be stored there, set a maximum limit for that item, or completely disable the slot.

There are also several functions for copying the current slot to all others, or from one slot to another.

Clicking the <Bold>cog</> button opens the <Bold>Advanced Settings</> panel.

From here you can <Bold>label</> any module with a custom tag which appears in the <Bold>Status View</> as well as several other functions.

You can also choose a module's <Bold>priority</> in this panel. Modules with a higher priority will <Bold>take more resources</> from sources than those with a lower priority - which is extremely useful for streamlining your station's manufacturing processes.

Congratulations Station Commander, you've completed the <Bold>Nova Corp Onboarding Process</>.

You're now ready to go forth and <Bold>build, explore and expand</> your industrial empire across the TAU system.

We see great things in your future, Commander - <Bold>good luck!</>

To generate <Bold>Antimatter</> you must construct a <Bold>Particle Accelerator Loop</>.

This is constructed from a <Bold>Control Station</>, one or more <Bold>Towers</>, all connected together via <Bold>Conduit</>.

Once you have a complete loop and have supplied your station with the required input items, you can start generating antimatter.

The <Bold>longer</> the loop you construct, the <Bold>faster</> you can generate antimatter, but the <Bold>more power</> your accelerator will require.

You can use the <Bold>Multi-Select</> tool to select multiple station modules and perform operations on all of them at the same time.

To use the tool, click the Multi-Select button from the lower toolbar and <Bold>Left-Click</> or <Bold>Left-Drag</> station modules to select them.

Click again or hold <Bold>Shift</> while dragging to <Bold>deselect</> modules.

The Multi-Select toolbar will appear and you can click one of the functions to apply it to all selected modules.

You can use <Bold>Blueprints</> to quickly and easily duplicate multiple station modules.

To create a blueprint, use the <Bold>Multi-Select</> tool to select multiple modules and click the <Bold>Create Blueprint</> button to open the blueprint creation menu.

When you are satisfied, click the <Bold>Create</> button to form a new blueprint from the selected modules.

You can then access your previously created blueprints from the <Bold>Build > Blueprints</> category.

Some locations have <Bold>planet-based resources</> that you can collect, and this is accomplished by building an <Bold>Exo Planet Ops Centre</>.

Each centre lets you deploy up to <Bold>4 planetary lifters</> to collect a specific resource, allowing you to fine-tune exactly which resources you want to gather.

Each location only allowed a <Bold>maximum number of lifters</> in total however, so you will need to pick and choose which resources each centre will collect carefully.

Use the <Bold>Recycler</> to turn your unwanted items, materials and parts into <Bold>Tokens</>.

Tokens can then be spent on various <Bold>rewards</> such as <Bold>Overdrive Cores</> and <Bold>Tech Points</>.

The higher-value the resource you send into the Recycler, the more progress you will make towards the next Token.

Please note: each time you purchase a Token, the next Token will cost more resources to purchase.

The <Bold>Laboratory</> can be used to unlock <Bold>alternative and more efficient recipes</> for commonly used items, materials and parts.

To unlock an alternate recipe, feed in the <Bold>required resources</> as shown in the popup list and then select it.

The alternative recipe will then appear in the recipe list of the appropriate factory.

Overdrive Cores can be inserted into compatible modules to substantially increase their efficiency and output.

Most factories and resource extractors can be overdriven by dragging an Overdrive Core into the slot located next to its Max Efficiency slider.

Overdrive Cores can be purchased with Tokens in the Recycler, or found in the world.
